summary: Full E2E smoke of UBC (Unacademy Backlog Counter). Backend curl checks and Playwright frontend flows both passed: register, login, onboard, dashboard counter/stats, add/done actions, current task edit+persist, history page (table + both charts), logout, wrong-password error, re-login persistence.
passed: POST /api/auth/register returns 200 with {id,email,name,token} and sets cookie
POST /api/onboard with initial_count=176 sets counter=176 and onboarded=true
POST /api/action kind=add amount=3 increments counter and stat-added
POST /api/action kind=done amount=1 decrements counter and increments stat-done; overall = added-done
Add 1 -> counter 177, added=+1; Done 1 -> counter 176, done=-1, overall=0; Add 3 -> counter 179, added=+4
Current task edit + save -> persists across page reload
History page loads, history-table has rows, counter-chart and throughput-chart render
Logout redirects to /login and clears session
Wrong password shows login-error: 'Invalid email or password'
Re-login persists counter (178) and task ('Physics Chapter 5')
notes: On dashboard, when current_task is empty the Task section auto-renders in edit mode (input visible immediately) rather than showing current-task-display first; not a bug, but test scripts should probe input visibility before clicking edit-task-btn. Overall stat shows sign prefix (e.g. '+3','-1') which is cosmetic and expected.
